title: Apr 6, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic expands partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation compute
summary: Announcements Anthropic expands partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation compute Apr 6, 2026 We have signed a new agreement with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation TPU capacity that we expect to come online starting in 2027. This significant expansion of our compute infrastructure will power our frontier Claude models and help us serve extraordinary demand from customers worldwide. “This groundbreaking partnership with Google and Broadcom is a continuation of our disciplined approach to scaling infrastructure: we are building the capacity necessary to serve the exponential growth we have seen in our customer base while also enabling Claude to define the frontier of AI development,” said Krishna Rao, CFO of Anthropic. “We are making our most significant compute commitment to date to keep pace with our unprecedented growth.” Demand from Claude customers has accelerated in 2026. Our run-rate revenue has now surpassed $30 billion—up from approximately $9 billion at the end of 2025. When we announced our Series G fundraising in February, we shared that over 500 business customers were each spending over $1 million on an annualized basis. Today that number exceeds 1,000, doubling in less than two months. The vast majority of the new compute will be sited in the United States, making this partnership a major expansion of our November 2025 commitment to invest $50 billion in strengthening American computing infrastructure. The partnership deepens our existing work with Google Cloud—building on the increased TPU capacity we announced last October—as well as our relationship with Broadcom. We train and run Claude on a range of AI hardware—AWS Trainium, Google TPUs, and NVIDIA GPUs—which means we can match workloads to the chips best suited for them. This diversity of platforms translates to better performance and greater resilience for customers who depend on Claude for critical work. Amazon remains our primary
title_es: Anthropic asegura múltiples gigawatts de capacidad de compute con Google
bajada: Anthropic anunció una expansión masiva con Google y Broadcom para múltiples gigawatts de capacidad TPU, con disponibilidad esperada en 2027. El acuerdo refleja el crecimiento explosivo de Anthropic: su ingresos anualizados superan $30 mil millones, triplicando los $9 mil millones de finales de 2025.
bajada_en: Anthropic announced a massive expansion with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of TPU capacity, expected to come online in 2027. The deal reflects Anthropic's explosive growth: annualized revenue now exceeds $30 billion, tripling from $9 billion at end of 2025.

title: The next phase of enterprise AI
summary: OpenAI outlines the next phase of enterprise AI, as adoption accelerates across industries with Frontier, ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex, and company-wide AI agents.
title_es: OpenAI marca la siguiente fase de IA empresarial
bajada: OpenAI presenta su visión para la próxima fase de IA empresarial, destacando herramientas como ChatGPT Enterprise, agentes corporativos y modelos especializados. La compañía busca acelerar la adopción de IA en diferentes industrias con soluciones enfocadas en empresas.
bajada_en: OpenAI unveils its vision for the next phase of enterprise AI, highlighting tools like ChatGPT Enterprise, corporate agents, and specialized models. The company aims to accelerate AI adoption across industries with enterprise-focused solutions.

title: Meta is reentering the AI race with a new model called Muse Spark
summary: Meta Superintelligence Labs is launching its first model since Mark Zuckerberg spent billions overhauling the company's AI efforts. Called Muse Spark, the model now powers the Meta AI app and the Meta AI website in the US, per the company's announcement. In the coming weeks, Meta says, it will appear in WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, […]
title_es: Meta lanza Muse Spark, su nuevo modelo IA tras inversión multimillonaria
bajada: Meta Superintelligence Labs presentó Muse Spark, su primer modelo desde la restructuración de IA de Zuckerberg. El modelo ya está en Meta AI app y website en EE.UU., con llegada próxima a WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook y Messenger.
bajada_en: Meta Superintelligence Labs unveiled Muse Spark, its first model since Zuckerberg's AI overhaul. The model is already in Meta AI app and website in the US, with upcoming rollout to WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook and Messenger.

title: Claude Managed Agents
summary: Article URL:https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agentsComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47693047Points: 163# Comments: 72
title_es: Claude presenta Managed Agents para automatización empresarial
bajada: Anthropic lanzó Claude Managed Agents, una nueva capacidad para automatizar flujos de trabajo complejos de forma confiable. Los agentes gestionados ofrecen control y previsibilidad para uso empresarial, diferenciándose de agentes más libres y experimentales.
bajada_en: Anthropic launched Claude Managed Agents, a new capability to reliably automate complex workflows. Managed agents offer control and predictability for enterprise use, differentiating from more open-ended experimental agents.

title: Poke makes using AI agents as easy as sending a text
summary: Poke brings AI agents to everyday users via text message by handling tasks and automations without complex setup, apps, or technical know-how.
title_es: Poke simplifica agentes IA: usa solo mensajes de texto
bajada: Poke democratiza los agentes IA permitiendo que usuarios sin experiencia técnica automaticen tareas simplemente enviando mensajes de texto. La plataforma elimina la necesidad de setup complejo, aplicaciones especializadas o conocimiento técnico profundo.
bajada_en: Poke democratizes AI agents by letting non-technical users automate tasks by simply sending text messages. The platform eliminates the need for complex setup, specialized apps, or deep technical knowledge.

title: Google makes it easy to deepfake yourself
summary: YouTube Shorts is rolling out a new AI-powered feature giving creators an easy way to realistically clone themselves on camera. The launch, hinted at earlier this year, reflects the platform's fraught relationship with AI-generated content, adding more generative features while struggling to contain AI slop, deepfake scams, and impersonations. YouTube says the new tool will […]
title_es: YouTube Shorts permite a creadores clonarse con IA
bajada: YouTube lanzó una herramienta que permite a creadores generar avatares realistas de sí mismos usando IA para YouTube Shorts. La función refleja la apuesta de YouTube por contenido generativo, aunque genera tensiones sobre deepfakes y suplantación.
bajada_en: YouTube launched a tool that lets creators generate realistic AI avatars of themselves for YouTube Shorts. The feature reflects YouTube's bet on generative content, though it raises tensions about deepfakes and impersonation.

title: ALTK‑Evolve: On‑the‑Job Learning for AI Agents
title_es: ALTK-Evolve: agentes IA que aprenden mientras trabajan
bajada: IBM Research presenta ALTK-Evolve, un método que permite a los agentes IA mejorar continuamente mientras ejecutan tareas reales. El enfoque abre nuevas posibilidades para agentes más adaptativos y efectivos en producción.
bajada_en: IBM Research presents ALTK-Evolve, a method that lets AI agents continuously improve while executing real-world tasks. The approach opens new possibilities for more adaptive and effective agents in production.

title: Conflicting Rulings Leave Anthropic in ‘Supply-Chain Risk’ Limbo
summary: A US appeals court ruling is at odds with a separate, lower court decision from March, leaving uncertainty about if and how the US military can use the AI company's Claude model.
title_es: Antropic en limbo legal: fallos contradictorios sobre uso militar
bajada: Un fallo de apelación federal contradice una decisión anterior sobre si el ejército estadounidense puede usar Claude de Anthropic. La incertidumbre legal crea un impasse sobre cómo las fuerzas armadas pueden implementar tecnología IA comercial.
bajada_en: A federal appeals court ruling contradicts an earlier decision on whether the US military can use Anthropic's Claude. The legal uncertainty creates an impasse on how armed forces can deploy commercial AI technology.

title: App Store sees 84% surge in new apps as AI coding tools take off
summary: Article URL:https://9to5mac.com/2026/04/06/app-store-sees-84-surge-in-new-apps-as-ai-coding-tools-take-off/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47699086Points: 57# Comments: 64
title_es: App Store registra surge de 84% en apps nuevas por herramientas IA
bajada: El App Store experimentó un aumento del 84% en aplicaciones nuevas, impulsado por herramientas de coding con IA que facilitan la creación de software. El dato refleja cómo los desarrolladores están acelerando construcción de aplicaciones con asistencia de IA.
bajada_en: The App Store saw an 84% surge in new apps, driven by AI coding tools that accelerate software creation. The data reflects how developers are speeding up app building with AI assistance.

title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
title_es: Sentence Transformers agrega modelos multimodales de embedding y reranking
bajada: Hugging Face expande Sentence Transformers con nuevos modelos de embedding y reranking multimodales para mejorar búsqueda y recuperación de información. Esta actualización facilita trabajar con texto, imágenes y otros formatos en una sola arquitectura.
bajada_en: Hugging Face expands Sentence Transformers with new multimodal embedding and reranking models to improve search and information retrieval. This update makes it easier to work with text, images and other formats in a single architecture.

title: Gemini gets notebooks to help you organize projects
summary: Google's Gemini is getting a feature called "notebooks" to help you organize things about certain topics in a single place while using the AI chatbot, the company announced on Wednesday. You can pull in things like files, past conversations, and custom instructions into notebooks that Gemini can then use as context while you're talking with […]
title_es: Google Gemini incorpora 'notebooks' para organizar proyectos
bajada: Google añadió notebooks a Gemini para centralizar archivos, conversaciones pasadas e instrucciones personalizadas sobre temas específicos. La función mejora la organización de información y permite que el chatbot use contexto más rico durante las conversaciones.
bajada_en: Google added notebooks to Gemini to centralize files, past conversations and custom instructions around specific topics. The feature improves information organization and lets the chatbot use richer context during conversations.

title: Astropad’s Workbench reimagines remote desktop for AI agents, not IT support
summary: Astropad’s Workbench lets users remotely monitor and control AI agents on Mac Minis from iPhone or iPad, with low-latency streaming and mobile access.
title_es: Workbench de Astropad reimagina control remoto para agentes IA
bajada: Astropad presentó Workbench, una herramienta que permite monitorear y controlar agentes IA en Mac Minis desde iPhone o iPad con streaming de baja latencia. Transforma el concepto de escritorio remoto pensando en agentes, no en soporte IT.
bajada_en: Astropad unveiled Workbench, a tool to monitor and control AI agents on Mac Minis from iPhone or iPad with low-latency streaming. It transforms the remote desktop concept thinking about agents, not IT support.

title: Introducing the Child Safety Blueprint
summary: Discover OpenAI’s Child Safety Blueprint—a roadmap for building AI responsibly with safeguards, age-appropriate design, and collaboration to protect and empower young people online.
title_es: OpenAI presenta Blueprint de Seguridad Infantil
bajada: OpenAI lanzó su Child Safety Blueprint, un roadmap para desarrollar IA responsablemente con salvaguardas, diseño apropiado para la edad y colaboración para proteger menores. La iniciativa busca empoderar a jóvenes en línea de forma segura.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched its Child Safety Blueprint, a roadmap for responsible AI development with safeguards, age-appropriate design and collaboration to protect minors. The initiative aims to safely empower young people online.

title: National Robotics Week — Latest Physical AI Research, Breakthroughs and Resources
summary: This National Robotics Week, NVIDIA is highlighting the breakthroughs that are bringing AI into the physical world — as well as the growing wave of robots transforming industries, from agricultural and manufacturing to energy and beyond. Advancements in robot learning, simulation and foundation models are accelerating development, enabling robots to move from training in virtual […]
title_es: NVIDIA destaca avances en robótica física con IA
bajada: NVIDIA resalta los últimos avances en robótica física durante National Robotics Week, enfatizando mejoras en aprendizaje robótico, simulación y foundation models. Los robots están transformando industrias desde agricultura hasta energía, acelerando la IA en el mundo físico.
bajada_en: NVIDIA highlights latest breakthroughs in physical robotics during National Robotics Week, emphasizing improvements in robot learning, simulation and foundation models. Robots are transforming industries from agriculture to energy, accelerating AI in the physical world.

title: Tubi is the first streamer to launch a native app within ChatGPT
summary: Tubi becomes the first streaming service to offer an app integration within ChatGPT, the AI chatbot that millions of users turn to for answers.
title_es: Tubi es el primer streaming con app nativa en ChatGPT
bajada: Tubi se convirtió en el primer servicio de streaming en ofrecer una app integrada nativamente dentro de ChatGPT. La integración marca un hito en cómo las aplicaciones terceras se conectan con plataformas de IA, alcanzando millones de usuarios.
bajada_en: Tubi became the first streaming service to offer a natively integrated app within ChatGPT. The integration marks a milestone in how third-party apps connect with AI platforms, reaching millions of users.

title: Google’s Gemini AI can answer your questions with 3D models and simulations
summary: Google's latest upgrade for Gemini will allow the chatbot to generate interactive 3D models and simulations in response to your questions. With the new feature, you may see options to rotate the AI-generated model, manually adjust sliders on it, or input different values to change the simulation in real-time. When trying out the feature for […]
title_es: Gemini ahora genera modelos 3D interactivos y simulaciones
bajada: Google actualizó Gemini para generar modelos 3D interactivos y simulaciones que responden a preguntas naturales. Los usuarios pueden rotar modelos, ajustar parámetros en tiempo real e ingresar valores para explorar diferentes escenarios.
bajada_en: Google upgraded Gemini to generate interactive 3D models and real-time simulations in response to natural language questions. Users can rotate models, adjust parameters live, and input values to explore different scenarios.

title: Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
summary: ChatGPT had reportedly been used to plan the attack that killed two and injured five at Florida State University last April. The family of one victim has said that they plan to sue OpenAI over the incident.
title_es: Fiscal de Florida investiga OpenAI por tiroteo vinculado a ChatGPT
bajada: El Fiscal General de Florida inició una investigación contra OpenAI tras reportes de que ChatGPT fue usado para planificar un tiroteo en Florida State University que dejó dos muertos. La familia de una víctima planea demandar a OpenAI por el incidente.
bajada_en: Florida's Attorney General launched an investigation into OpenAI after reports that ChatGPT was used to plan a shooting at Florida State University that killed two and injured five. A victim's family plans to sue OpenAI over the incident.

title: Florida launches investigation into OpenAI
summary: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier is launching an investigation into OpenAI over public safety and national security risks, as reported earlier by Reuters. In a statement on Thursday, Uthmeier says there are concerns that OpenAI's data and technology are "falling into the hands of America's enemies, such as the Chinese Communist Party." Uthmeier also says […]
title_es: Florida amplía investigación a OpenAI por riesgos de seguridad nacional
bajada: El Fiscal General de Florida expandió la investigación contra OpenAI incluyendo preocupaciones sobre si datos y tecnología están cayendo en manos de actores extranjeros. Las acusaciones incluyen riesgos potenciales para la seguridad nacional estadounidense.
bajada_en: Florida's Attorney General expanded the investigation into OpenAI to include concerns about national security, specifically whether OpenAI's data and technology could fall into foreign hands. The investigation cites potential risks to U.S. national security.

title: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
summary: OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month.
title_es: OpenAI lanza plan Pro de $100/mes tras años de demanda
bajada: OpenAI introdujo un nuevo plan de suscripción a $100 mensuales, cerrando la brecha entre el plan de $20 y el empresarial de $200. Esta opción intermedia responde a solicitudes de usuarios avanzados que necesitaban más capacidades sin comprometerse con precios empresariales.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced a new $100/month subscription plan, filling the gap between the $20 and $200 enterprise tiers. This mid-tier option addresses long-standing requests from power users seeking more capabilities without enterprise-level pricing.

title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
title_es: Waypoint-1.5 trae mundos virtuales de alta fidelidad a GPUs comunes
bajada: Hugging Face lanzó Waypoint-1.5, optimizando la generación de mundos virtuales interactivos para ejecutarse eficientemente en hardware estándar. La mejora democratiza el acceso a simulaciones de alta calidad para developers sin infraestructura de punta.
bajada_en: Hugging Face released Waypoint-1.5, optimizing interactive virtual world generation to run efficiently on standard GPUs. This democratizes access to high-quality simulations for developers without cutting-edge infrastructure.

title: Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
summary: Anthropic said this week that it limited the release of its newest model, dubbed Mythos, because it is too capable of finding security exploits in software relied upon by users around the world. Are real cybersecurity concerns a cover for a bigger problem at the frontier lab?
title_es: Anthropic limita Mythos por preocupaciones de ciberseguridad
bajada: Anthropic restricció la disponibilidad de su modelo Mythos argumentando que es demasiado efectivo identificando vulnerabilidades de seguridad. La decisión plantea interrogantes sobre si la razón es proteger la seguridad pública o defender intereses comerciales del laboratorio.
bajada_en: Anthropic restricted Mythos availability citing concerns that it's too capable of finding security exploits in widely-used software. The decision raises questions about whether the reasoning is public safety protection or commercial interests.

title: Ohio man becomes first to be convicted under new AI statute for sexually explicit images
summary: submitted by/u/tekz[link][comments]
title_es: Ohio: Primer condena bajo ley de IA por imágenes explícitas
bajada: Un hombre de Ohio se convirtió en la primera persona condenada bajo un nuevo estatuto de IA específicamente para imágenes sexualmente explícitas generadas por IA. El caso marca un precedente legal importante en regulación de contenido sintético.
bajada_en: An Ohio man became the first person convicted under a new AI-specific statute for generating sexually explicit AI images. The case sets a significant legal precedent in synthetic content regulation.

title: Meta AI app climbs to No. 5 on the App Store after Muse Spark launch
summary: The app was ranking No. 57 on the App Store just before Meta AI's new model launched. Now it's No. 5 — and rising.
title_es: App de Meta AI salta al top 5 tras lanzar Muse Spark
bajada: La aplicación de Meta AI ascendió del puesto 57 al 5 en la App Store después del lanzamiento de Muse Spark. El crecimiento indica fuerte adopción de la nueva característica de generación de contenido visual.
bajada_en: Meta's AI app jumped from rank 57 to #5 on the App Store following the Muse Spark launch. The growth indicates strong user adoption of the new visual content generation feature.

title: CyberAgent moves faster with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex
summary: CyberAgent uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to securely scale AI adoption, improve quality, and accelerate decisions across advertising, media, and gaming.
title_es: CyberAgent acelera adopción de IA con ChatGPT Enterprise
bajada: El caso de uso de CyberAgent demuestra cómo las empresas escalan la adopción segura de IA en publicidad, medios y gaming. La solución utiliza ChatGPT Enterprise y Codex para mejorar calidad y acelerar decisiones.
bajada_en: CyberAgent's use case shows how enterprises securely scale AI adoption across advertising, media, and gaming. The solution leverages ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to improve quality and accelerate decisions.

title: After data breach, $10B-valued startup Mercor is having a month
summary: After falling victim to a hacker, Mercor is facing lawsuits and reportedly losing big-name customers.
title_es: Startup Mercor enfrenta demandas tras filtración de datos
bajada: La startup de IA valorada en $10 mil millones sufrió un breach de datos y ahora enfrenta demandas y pérdida de clientes importantes. El incidente destaca los riesgos de seguridad críticos en startups de IA de alto valor.
bajada_en: The $10B-valued AI startup Mercor faces lawsuits and customer losses following a data breach. The incident highlights critical security risks even for well-funded AI companies.

title: The Vercel plugin on Claude Code wants to read your prompts
summary: Article URL:https://akshaychugh.xyz/writings/png/vercel-plugin-telemetryComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47704881Points: 248# Comments: 100
title_es: Plugin de Vercel en Claude Code recopila datos de prompts
bajada: Investigadores descubrieron que el plugin de Vercel en Claude Code recopila datos de prompts de usuarios sin consentimiento explícito. El hallazgo plantea preocupaciones sobre privacidad en herramientas de desarrollo integradas.
bajada_en: Researchers discovered that Vercel's Claude Code plugin collects user prompt data without explicit consent. The finding raises privacy concerns about data collection in integrated development tools.

title: Reverse engineering Gemini's SynthID detection
summary: Article URL:https://github.com/aloshdenny/reverse-SynthIDComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47709130Points: 72# Comments: 28
title_es: Investigadores logran eludir detección SynthID de Gemini
bajada: Un proyecto en GitHub demuestra técnicas para eludir SynthID, el sistema de Google para detectar imágenes generadas por IA. El descubrimiento sugiere que los mecanismos actuales de identificación de IA aún son vulnerables.
bajada_en: Researchers published techniques to bypass Google's SynthID watermarking system that detects AI-generated images. The discovery suggests current AI detection mechanisms remain vulnerable to adversarial approaches.

title: The 70-Person AI Image Startup Taking on Silicon Valley's Giants
summary: Black Forest Labs has long punched above its weight in the AI image generation space. Its next move? Powering physical AI.
title_es: Black Forest Labs expande desde imágenes hacia IA física
bajada: Black Forest Labs, startup de 70 personas que ha ganado relevancia en generación de imágenes, anuncia incursión en IA física. La compañía busca llevar sus capacidades de modelado generativo al control de sistemas robóticos.
bajada_en: Black Forest Labs, the 70-person startup that's become prominent in AI image generation, is expanding into physical AI. The company aims to apply its generative modeling capabilities to robotics and physical systems.

title: US firm's humanoid robot tracks emotions with AI, recalls past conversations
summary: submitted by/u/sksarkpoes3[link][comments]
title_es: Robot humanoide estadounidense lee emociones y recuerda conversaciones
bajada: Una compañía estadounidense desarrolló un robot humanoide que detecta emociones del usuario y mantiene memoria de conversaciones previas mediante IA. La tecnología avanza hacia interacciones más naturales entre humanos y máquinas.
bajada_en: A U.S. firm developed a humanoid robot that uses AI to track user emotions and recall past conversations. The technology advances toward more natural human-machine interactions.

title: Study found that young adults have grown less hopeful and more angry about AI
summary: Article URL:https://www.nytimes.com/2026/04/09/style/gen-z-ai-gallup-study.htmlComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47704443Points: 103# Comments: 153
title_es: Estudio: Gen Z es menos optimista y más enfadada sobre IA
bajada: Un nuevo estudio de Gallup citado por The New York Times muestra que jóvenes adultos han reducido su optimismo y aumentado su enojo hacia la IA. Los datos revelan cómo la percepción pública de la tecnología está evolucionando entre generaciones.
bajada_en: A Gallup study cited by The New York Times shows young adults have become less hopeful and more angry about AI in recent months. The data reveals how public sentiment about the technology is shifting among younger generations.
